conditions.critical_condition_basis: THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w) established as critical solvent composition for PIB
conditions.detector: Waters 2996 Photodiode Array detector (UV) and Waters 2414 Refractive Index detector (RI)
conditions.evidence_text: The critical solvent composition for PIB was established as THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w). ... LCCC was conducted on a Waters HPLC system ... One reversed phase C18 chromatography column (YMC HPLC COLUMN) ... All measurements were carried out at a constant column temperature of 35 C ... flow rate of 0.5 mL/min.
conditions.notes: Used for separation of PIB species according to chemical heterogeneity (end-group functionality) independent of MW.

conditions.critical_condition_basis: THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w) established as critical solvent composition for PIB
conditions.detector: ELS detector (Varian 385-LC) and Waters 2996 Photodiode Array detector (UV)
conditions.evidence_text: According to Fig. 6 in THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w) PIB samples with identical chemical functionality eluted at the same position, independently of their MW. ... LCCC chromatograms of PIB samples of different functionality but similar MW ... under critical condition using ELS detector
conditions.notes: Used for determination of critical conditions and analysis of mixtures. Text notes that ELS signal is not strictly proportional to concentration.
